examples: An urban food myth contends that if food spends just a few seconds on the floor, dirt and germs won't have much of a chance to contaminate it.
Hostile relationships invidiously contaminate our wellbeing.
Previously, MTBE (methyl tertiary-butyl ether) was the oxygenate of choice, but fell out of favour in 2004 when it was found to contaminate ground water.
Opponents say that fracking can contaminate drinking water supplies, a conclusion the industry vigorously denies.
But again, speeding up the process could contaminate the process, and I just cannot do that.
